creator: villa.alberto@gmail.com
text:
the distfile can't be fetched, i'm sorry, i didn't notice that it was a 
dynamic link

here's a new shar file: the port (now updated to 0.1.5) downloads the sources 
directly from git in the post-extract target... i hope that it is an allowed 
behaviour!
-- 
Alberto Villa <villa.alberto@gmail.com>

The bugs you have to avoid are the ones that give the user not only the 
inclination to get on a plane, but also the time. -- Kay Bostic
